global_description: Small mammal with a compact, rounded body, covered in soft fur, typically gray, brown, or white. It has long ears, a short fluffy tail, and strong hind legs for hopping. The face is characterized by a small nose and prominent whiskers.

part_details.ears: Long and upright, covered in soft fur
part_details.body: Compact and rounded, with soft fur
part_details.legs: Strong hind legs, shorter front legs

spatial_relations: Ears positioned on top of head
Hind legs beneath body, longer than front legs
Nose at front of face, whiskers extending outward
